graph_protocol: Frozen offline token/domain statistics. Inference URLs are projected without updating graph/statistics.
important_note: This is a final deployment model trained on the available full feature matrix. Scientific performance must be reported from domain-insulated CV, not from this full-training export.
limitations: Predictions are probabilistic and should not be treated as absolute truth.
Backend feature extraction must exactly match the exported feature schema.
If backend cannot reproduce all URL-only features, predictions will be unreliable.
Live inference must not perform DNS, WHOIS, HTML fetching, screenshots, or reputation lookup.
